summary: No connecting stage + local card lingers ~1min while ComfyUI reloads custom nodes on connect.
Root-caused: feed tick sees connected=false + connecting=false in the wrapper-ready/comfyReady=false window → paints local · offline.
Fixed in 7312249: ready && !noGpu && comfyReady===false → connecting=true. Truth-table verified; NOT live-validated (user cannot validate this session).
